description: Welcome home to Sundays on Grant by Anthem, a modern community in a quiet, family-friendly pocket of West Coquitlam just 5 minutes from Burquitlam SkyTrain, shops, restaurants, and the YMCA. Located a short walk from Miller Park Elementary, Banting Middle School and the trails at Chines Park. This efficient 1,207 sf 3-bedroom + den townhome features a highly functional layout with a main-level bedroom with private balcony, convenient powder room, open-concept living and dining area, contemporary kitchen with high-end appliances flowing to a second private balcony. The upper level offers a primary bedroom with a walk-in closet and double-vanity ensuite, plus a second bedroom, full bath and flexible den perfect for a home office or playroom. Open by private appointment.
